label: Staking Rewards
description: Track, claim, and sell staking rewards across protocols. Shows reward P&L attribution by source.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx (WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets). requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full] non-empty. availableOn=[defi] non-empty. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file. Loading state: DeFiDataContext is synchronous; React.Suspense boundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers async; comment added. Empty state: guard added for stakingRewards.length===0. Error state: guard added for nullish stakingRewards/rewardPnl data. No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — data exclusively via useDeFiData(). 1.2 pass — context calls useGlobalScope() and reads organizationIds+strategyIds. 1.3 pass — org filter gates hasDefiDesk which controls balances/protocol availability. 1.4 fail — stakingRewards is not filtered by client scope; it always returns MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS regardless of selected org/client. 1.5 fail — stakingRewards is not filtered by strategyIds scope (only tradeHistory respects strategy scope). 1.6 pass — empty org arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk=true), empty strategyIds returns unfiltered tradeHistory. 1.7 fail — MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS and MOCK_REWARD_PNL seed data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough, not lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Context file not modified per task instructions.

findings.description: Missing empty state: widget rendered stakingRewards.map() with no guard when array is empty.
Missing error state: no nullish data guard before rendering stakingRewards/rewardPnl.
Missing loading state comment: context is synchronous so isLoading is structurally absent; added clarifying comment and noted Suspense boundary in widget-wrapper.tsx.
stakingRewards data is not filtered by org/client scope — always returns full MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS regardless of globalScope.organizationIds or clientIds.
stakingRewards data is not filtered by strategy scope — globalScope.strategyIds has no effect on staking rewards (only tradeHistory respects strategyIds).
MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS and MOCK_REWARD_PNL seed data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough instead of lib/constants/ or lib/config/.
